title: Void conditions
content:
Last updated date
29.6.2017
Employment Ordinance
Part IV	
4-4
Section 19	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
Any condition in a contract of employment which makes the 
payment of any annual bonus, or any end of year payment or any 
proportion thereof, subject to working on rest days granted under 
this Part shall be void.
(Amended 48 of 1984 s. 10)
Last updated date
29.6.2017
Employment Ordinance
Part IV	
4-6
Section 21	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
Part IVA
Protection Against Anti-union Discrimination
(Part IVA added 51 of 1974 s. 3. Format changes—E.R. 3 of 2017)
